title: Ownership Scaling
description: Full ownership vs delegated management tradeoffs. Owning everything directly gives best margins but limits scale. Delegating allows growth but with efficiency losses. Strategic choice about organization structure.
definition-of-done: Direct ownership option with full profits. Delegated management with profit sharing. Scaling limits on direct ownership. Organization structure visualization.
testing-plan: Verify ownership options work. Test profit distribution. Verify scaling limits. Test structure visualization.
